title: Luffy Lands in Wano and Meets Tama
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Tama, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Kaido as Luffy lands in Wano, meets Tama, and immediately collides with the poverty and cruelty of Kaido’s rule.
scene: Luffy washes up in Wano, meets Tama, and discovers a country suffering under Kaido’s rule.

dialogue.speaker: Tama
dialogue.text: B-Big Bro?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I hope this dog knows the way. We're going to a doctor!

dialogue.speaker: Tama
dialogue.text: OH! TAMA!

dialogue.speaker: Tama
dialogue.text: Big bro, you're a big fat liar!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Oi, knock it off. You'll fall.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: ACE IS COMING! I KNOW'N IT!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He can't! Everyone knows what happened during the summit war!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: But... He promised me!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ACE! Take me out to sea with you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: TAMA! You're still just 5 years old, silly.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: We'll be back! With a bigger crew!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Willn you take me with you then?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: pirates have to be strong!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When we come back, if you've become a bewitching girl Ninja or somethin',

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: We'll take ya!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She doesn't have to be "bewitching," Ace! hahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: It's'n a promise, then!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Someone knows it

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: We were such good friends!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: He said he'd come back!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You just don't know how nice ace is, big bro!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's why you don't under- stand how much what you said hurts!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Quit hitting me! Not that it hurts, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How could you just say "He's dead" like that?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: OH! WE'LL BE LEAVING THE BAMBO FOREST TO THE NORTH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: It's just like that nose guy said!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: It really has been...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: decimated, huh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: G??? RPR!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: A Tiger!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: A BOAR!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Fright!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: And what's that?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: A-A CROCO- SHARK!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Dang, it looks super wild!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why don't we just eat that thing, then?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All the strong samural that could catch'n that thing are either locked up or become bandits!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Besides, the animals all drink the polluted water of the river.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: They're basically poisonous to humans.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What the heck?! It looks so tasty! Unforgiv- able.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Is that smoking thingy the factory, then?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yes! That's where their mine and weapons fac-tory are.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There is a lot of Kaido's men there, too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: And what do they eat?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Shogun and Kaido each have their own clean, private plantations that they eat off of.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Over there, they have clean water, clean rice, clean fish, and clean meat...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Come on! So there are places where there's food in this country, huh?!

summary: This section advances the Wano Country Arrival storyline with 47 dialogue beats. Luffy’s first steps in Wano establish Tama’s kindness, the country’s hunger, and the brutality of Kaido’s forces.
